title: COMMUNITY HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SALUD MEDICAL CENTER COMMUNITY HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Maternity Support Services and Infant Case Management. The Care Team will assist the family with resources, education regarding pregnancy, breastfeeding, labor & delivery, parenting skills, or setting goals. Services are offered by phone, in the clinics, or in the client’s home. 1175 Mt Hood Avenue Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Medicaid required Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-7pm, Friday 7:30am-5pm, Saturday 8am-11:40am adn 12:40pm-5pm (503) 982-2000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 982-2000 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Case/Care Management * Pregnant Individuals Childbirth Education Parenting Skills Classes Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALUD MEDICAL CENTER
